Features.webDesc: We create high-quality, fast, and modern websites using Next.js and the latest technologies. User-friendly interface and ultra-premium design.
Features.botDesc: Telegram bots of any complexity to automate your business. Integration of payment systems, admin panels, and artificial intelligence.
Features.apiDesc: Robust and secure backend systems, complex API integrations, and database management. Architecture resistant to high loads.

About.title: About Me
About.description: I am a developer specializing in creating modern web technologies and complex Telegram bots. I approach each project with premium design and high efficiency.

Services.title: Services
Services.webDevDesc: Fast and modern sites using Next.js and TailwindCSS.
Services.apiSystemsDesc: Development of robust and secure backend systems.
